title: Goalkeeper Contract
description: Frontmatter schema for a goalkeeper contract.md file. The body of the contract.md (after frontmatter) is free-form context, file pointers, and constraints in the spirit of a Ralph PROMPT.md.

slug.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. Used as the directory name under .claude/goals/.

objective.description: One-sentence statement of what success looks like.

non_goals.description: Explicit out-of-scope items. Prevents scope drift.

definition_of_done.description: Qualitative + quantitative criteria the judge checks against. Necessary AND sufficient.

command.description: Shell command run after each checkpoint. Necessary but not sufficient — judge gates final approval.

success.description: exit_zero | regex:<pattern>. How to interpret command output.

checkpoint_cadence.description: When to log progress and run validator.

max_rejections.description: After N consecutive judge rejections, status becomes needs_human and execution pauses.

judge_mode.description: subagent: spawn a fresh agent for clean-context gating. inline: cheap re-read with current context (advisory only).

wakeup_seconds.description: Override the default ScheduleWakeup delay between iterations.

diff_excludes.description: Additional pathspec globs to exclude from the judge's diff context. Appended to goalkeeper's defaults (lockfiles, build outputs, coverage, IDE files). Use when your repo produces noisy auto-generated files outside the standard list.
